==source of is branded_fares_preselected==
    ubia.is_branded_fares_preselected_trip,



=Filter out branded fares orders=
In the end I made a filter in the training pipeline to filter out branded fares orders.

==orders for analysis==
fetcher.py

* fetcher_headroom.fetch_headroom(
* fetch_pricing_method
* fetch_tb1
*  fetch_abx_ids_and_abx_scenarios


==orders for training==
fetcher_headroom.py

==fetch_provier_items==
called by
* fetch_revenue_summary
* fetch_headroom

==training==
repo: headroom_training
file: source.py

get_data()
    fetcher_headroom.fetch_headroom
    
get_predictions()
    fetcher_headroom.get_customer_item_predictions
